data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: WhatsApp encrypts all user data to protect it from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for data at rest, TLS 1.3 for data in transit.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Added security layer that requires users to verify their identity using a secondary method.
data.technical_spec: Optional 6-digit code setup for account verification.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security assessments to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Internal and external security audits followed by third-party penetration testing.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Implements systems to constantly monitor and detect potential security threats.
data.technical_spec: Use of AI and machine learning algorithms for advanced threat detection.

data.title: User Privacy Controls
data.description: Provides users with control over their privacy settings including last seen, profile picture visibility, etc.
data.technical_spec: Granular privacy settings accessible via the app’s settings menu.
